subject: Remove Variable in POM
commit_message:
Remove Variable in POM

Due to the oparent, it's impossible to keep the variables to define the
nexus accesses because Maven needs the parent first to identify default
values. So it has been removed

Change-Id: I9418d663ef5a8ec0096c00e2f27a1dfc0c04a605
Issue-Id: CLAMP-43
Signed-off-by: sebdet <sd378r@intl.att.com>
